zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Paston於1438年出生在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓時，她的父親William Paston61歲，母親Agnes Berry38歲。她於1458年與Sir George Browne在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年2月1日在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Paston于1438年出生在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓时，她的父亲William Paston61岁，母亲Agnes Berry38岁。她于1458年与Sir George Browne在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1488年2月1日在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name, chiefly from Paston in Norfolk, probably derived from an Old English personal name Pæcci (genitive Pæcces) or Old English pæsc(e) (the source of northern English dialect pash ‘puddle’) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

English (West Midlands): sometimes a variant of Patstone, a habitational name chiefly from the lost Padston(e) in Bromsgrove (Worcestershire), and occasionally from Padson in Inwardleigh (Devon). The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Padda (genitive Paddes) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Devon placename is uncertain due to a lack of medieval forms, though an early spelling suggests the final element is Old English dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Paston was born in 1438, in Paston, Norfolk, England, her father, William Paston, was 61 and her mother, Agnes Berry, was 38. She married Sir George Browne in 1458, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 1 February 1488, in Blackfriars, London, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Paston est née en 1438, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Paston, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Agnes Berry, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Browne en 1458, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 février 1488, à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Paston 1438 in Paston, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Paston 61 und ihre Mutter Agnes Berry 38. Sie hat 1458 in Paston, Norfolk, England Sir George Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Februar 1488 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Blackfriars, London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Paston è nata il nel 1438 nel Paston, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William Paston, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Agnes Berry, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Browne nel 1458, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 febbraio 1488, nel Blackfriars, London, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pastonが1438年にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父William Pastonは61歳，母Agnes Berryは38歳であった。1458年にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでSir George Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年2月1日にイギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Paston(이)가 1438년 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Paston(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Berry(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 Sir George Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 2월 1일 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Paston nasceu em 1438, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Paston, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Berry, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Browne em 1458, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1488, em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Paston родилась в 1438 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Paston было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Berry, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Browne в 1458 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 февраля 1488 г. в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Paston nació en 1438, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Paston, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Agnes Berry, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir George Browne en 1458, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1488, en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
